message:
🌱 Add SECURITY_CONTACTS.md and OWNERS (#50)

Add org-wide default security contacts (clubanderson, MikeSpreitzer)
and OWNERS file for the .github repo.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@ + +Defined below are the security contacts for this repo. + +They are the contact point for the Product Security Committee to reach out +to for triaging and handling of incoming issues. + +The below names agree to address security concerns if and when they arise. + +DO NOT REPORT SECURITY VULNERABILITIES DIRECTLY TO THESE NAMES, SEND INFORMATION +TO [kubestellar-security-announce@googlegroups.com](mailto:kubestellar-security-announce@googlegroups.com) + +clubanderson
+MikeSpreitzer
+
